questions.question_text: What is tribology and its applications? Explain. Explain the various functions of Lubricant Additives. Explain the friction and give the classification of frictional contacts. Explain Petroff's relation for power loss in journal bearing. Explain the main causes of friction. List the various applications of sliding contact and rolling contact bearings. What is Sommerfeld number? What is its significance? List the advantages of thrust bearings with suitable examples.
What are the factors affecting the performance of lubricant? Explain the various properties of lubricant.
What are the consequences of unsatisfactory lubrication systems? Explain the various lubricant supply systems.
What are causes of friction? Explain the theory of adhesion friction given by Bowden and Tabor and how Tabor validated this theory.
Explain the adhesive and abrasive wear with suitable examples in detail.
Derivethe two-dimensional Reynolds equation for the incompressible flow of lubricant in journal bearing.

Explainthe general steps with expressions for designing the journal bearing. OR A hydrodynamic slider is 100mm long and has infinite width. The maximum and minimum oil film thicknesses are 200 microns and 100 microns respectively. If the viscosity of lubricant is 0.05Pas and speed of the slider is 15m/sec. Determine the maximum pressure and the load capacity per cm width of the slider.

Why flat plate thrust bearing over tilting pad thrust bearing is preferred? Explain in detail. OR What is need of thrust bearing? Describe different types of thrust bearingsalong with their applications.
Derive an equation of pressure distribution and load carrying capacity of tilting pad thrust bearing.
